confirmation_snippet: Thank you for applying. Your application has been received.

dropdowns.label: United States (rendered as +1 in iti-merged select)

notes: DeepMind form has Country react-select but uses iti-flag rendering inside the option (option text 'United States +1', single-value displays as '+1'). The select kept aria-invalid=true even after selection — but submit accepted it on second click. Demographic dropdowns from dryrun (demographic_question_19463/4/5) not rendered on this form, just skipped.
